surfaces.dashboard_card: bg-secondary/50 border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

layout.marketing: Asymmetrical Bento grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12), high negative space, staggered components.
layout.dashboard: Control Room grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), tight density, full height stretch for items.

motion_and_animations.page_transition: Fade and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0) with duration 0.6s easeInOut.
motion_and_animations.staggered_reveals: List items and grid cards should use staggerChildren: 0.1 for satisfying cascading load effects.
motion_and_animations.hover_effects: Buttons scale up 1.05x, backgrounds slide in. Dashboard cards lift up (-4px) with enhanced border glow.
motion_and_animations.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion useScroll to add subtle parallax to background images and bento grid elements.
motion_and_animations.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons for primary CTAs (using framer-motion useMotionValue), pulsing dots on status badges.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for marketing, slightly rounded (rounded-md) for dashboard. High contrast text.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized inputs. Floating labels or clean minimalist inputs with bottom border only (Architectural feel).
components.tables: Shadcn tables with sticky headers, striped rows on hover, highly readable monospaced numbers for fees/IDs.
components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header with z-50. Navigation links must have animated underlines on hover.

hero_exterior.description: Contemporary building showcasing modern architecture with glass facade and structural design.

lounge_students.description: Group of students studying in a modern lounge.
lounge_students.usage: About us or Community section in public pages.

abstract_texture.description: Black and blue abstract background with wavy lines.
abstract_texture.usage: Dashboard background or login screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all animations, 'lucide-react' for icons, and '@studio-freight/lenis' for smooth scrolling on public pages.
IMPORTANT: You are working with .jsx/.js files, NOT .tsx. Generate standard JavaScript code and components.
Use 'react-router-dom' for routing across the hybrid app (Public, Admin, Student).
For the UI, heavily rely on pure Tailwind for marketing pages (bento grids, asymmetry), and customized Shadcn UI for the dashboard and forms.
Implement a dark/light mode toggle. Default to Dark mode.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="apply-hostel-button"').
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided image_urls for visual assets.
Do not use the 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text via Google Fonts.
Admin Dashboard requires realistic charts (recharts or Shadcn charts) for stats like occupied beds, revenue.
Hostel Application Form must have step-by-step or smooth sliding transitions using Framer Motion AnimatePresence.
Ensure the hero image has a proper gradient overlay to maintain text contrast (minimum 4.5:1 ratio).
